query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 'Lead Batch' as tipo FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead Batch%' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*), 'Lead Rank' FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead Rank%' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*), 'Lead C0-C2' FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead C0%' OR nome LIKE 'Lead C1%' OR nome LIKE 'Lead C2%' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*), 'Teste/Test' FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE '%Teste%' OR nome LIKE '%Test%' OR email LIKE '%test%';
